title: Micro-Uncrewed (UxS) Systems for Dangerous Vessel Compartment Inspections

body.description: This Request for Information (RFI) is part of a market research effort by the United States Coast Guard (USCG) Research and Development Center (RDC) to determine the availability and capability of vendors to provide Micro-Uncrewed Systems (Micro-UxS) for the inspection of dangerous vessel compartments and to enhance operational effectiveness.
